nasb.text: I will hurl you and your mother who bore you into another country where you were not born, and there you will die.

esv.text: I will hurl you and the mother who bore you into another country, where you were not born, and there you shall die.

cnv.text: 我要把你和生你的母親驅趕到異地去，你們不是生在那裡，卻要死在那裡。

ccb.text: 我要把你和你母亲赶到异乡，那里不是你们的出生之地，却是葬身之处。
